## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Marcel's upcoming AI course and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is developing an AI course focused on content creation workflows and practical applications](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [David expressed interest in creating AI-powered recipe books/playbooks for specific use cases (e.g. private equity)](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

  - [Marcel's company is operating as a high-margin AI-enabled agency, with plans to potentially evolve into a platform](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Upcoming AI Course

  - [Focuses on content creation workflows and practical AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Covers job decomposition, workflow building, and AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Aims to teach "AI native" skills - understanding model capabilities and limitations](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Includes lessons from real client work (e.g. DeepGram, Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [David expressed interest in taking the course](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)

### AI Workflow Tools and Approaches

  - [Marcel uses AirOps for building complex AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Demonstrated examples: personalized email generation, content adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Discussed benefits of AirOps vs. Airtable for AI tasks (cost, flexibility)](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of human expertise in workflow design](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)

### Potential Collaboration Ideas

  - [David suggested creating AI-powered "recipe books" for specific use cases (e.g. private equity tasks)](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

  - [David offered to introduce Marcel to CMO forums for potential workshops](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

### Marcel's AI-Enabled Agency Model

  - [Currently operating at 70% profit margins](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)

  - [Scaling rapidly (0 to $2M run rate in 4 months)](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=2275.0)
  - [Exploring paths between pure services and potential platform play](https://fathom.video/share/vV2ZZyCQ7yxCM3v6zDxzUzEY8dyiJuNW?tab=summary&timestamp=2385.0)
